name: brain-paper-to-alpha-plugin
description: Agent-native paper-to-alpha workflow plugin for WorldQuant BRAIN research, candidate generation, simulation handoff, repair, and memory logging.

interface.shortDescription: Turn papers and ideas into disciplined BRAIN alpha candidates.
interface.longDescription: An Agent-native Claude Code and Codex plugin that adapts a paper-to-code pipeline into a WorldQuant BRAIN paper-to-alpha workflow. It adds skills, slash-command workflows, local artifact validation, hypothesis cards, BRAIN expression candidate batches, simulation queues, evaluation records, repair loops, and research memory without running live BRAIN simulations unless explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Create a WQ BRAIN research run folder.
Turn this paper into BRAIN alpha candidates.
Repair this failed BRAIN alpha result.
